description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named pages that runs in the deploy stage using the node Docker image. The job defines the variable NUXT_APP_BASE_URL set to /nuxt/, configures a cache keyed on package-lock.json that stores .npm/, runs npm ci --cache .npm --prefer-offline in before_script, then executes npm run generate in the script, publishes the generated site from .output/public, and stores .output/public as an artifact. It only runs when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME equals $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH.
